_description: Session bootstrap served from GitHub. Project list and notes are inline. _endpoints URLs work from a browser or Supabase MCP (desktop) — not from Claude session web_fetch.

instructions: 1. Acknowledge the bootstrap is loaded, including version number.
2. The projects section below contains current status and key notes for all active projects. Use this as your working context for the session.
3. Behaviour rules are in your session preferences — apply them.
4. The _endpoints URLs are for browser or Supabase MCP access only. Do NOT attempt to fetch them via web_fetch — they will fail from Claude sessions.
5. When starting perspective work: note that add_finalise needs redesign — that is the current task. Query authoritative nodes if Supabase MCP is available.
6. This bootstrap is READ-ONLY. To query or update the live KB, use the Supabase MCP on desktop or the SQL editor.

perspective.summary: Representation Space Traversal AI — traversal of data representation space as the primary computational mechanism.
perspective.note: Query authoritative first. add_finalise needs redesign — current task.

blob_world.summary: Analytically deformable star-shaped soft-body creatures. Rust. ALife/evolutionary simulation target.
blob_world.note: Resume: rendering fiber artifact deferred, physics next.

ecosystem_ccg.summary: Ecosystem-building CCG in Rust. Shared biome, fitness-based population dynamics.
ecosystem_ccg.note: game.rs/ai.rs/ui.rs not yet updated to v4 types — first task next session.

children_of_battle.summary: Mobile tactical roguelike with generational breeding, deck-building combat, and permadeath.

_endpoints._note: These URLs require a browser or Supabase MCP. They do not work via Claude session web_fetch.
